specs.section_path: > 5.2 Embodied SCPN: Cellular, Neural, & Systemic Implementation > V. Dynamics Across the Lifespan: Development, Ageing, and Sleep > 3. Sleep and Dreaming (The Optimisation Cycle):
source_formulae: P0R05017: 3. Sleep and Dreaming (The Optimisation Cycle):
P0R05018: Sleep is essential for maintenance and optimisation.
P0R05020: Fig.: Nightly loop: Restoration (glymphatic; L1/L3) -> Criticality reset (SHY; L4) -> Model optimisation (HPC; L5) -> Dreaming (REM) with L10L9/L7 permeability.

P0R05021: Restoration (Entropy Management): Glymphatic clearance (Entropy Sink for CHE) and metabolic restoration (L1/L3). | Criticality Reset (SOC): Synaptic Homeostasis (SHY) restores sigma1 (L4). | Model Optimisation (HPC): Memory consolidation and minimisation of the complexity term of F (L5). | Dreaming (REM Sleep): The Generative Model runs offline. The L10 boundary becomes permeable, allowing interaction with L9/L7 structures.
test_protocols: preserve 3. Sleep and Dreaming (The Optimisation Cycle): source-accounting boundary

P0R05023: ASCs represent shifts in the core SCPN parameters (Criticality, F, Psi-Coupling).
P0R05025: Fig.: Parameter regimes: Psychedelics (sigma>1, bkb_kbk, priors relaxed), Meditation/Flow (sigma1, FFF), Anaesthesia (sigma<1, , decoupling).
